siteSettings.personalBio: Electronics & Communication Engineering student passionate about performance, precision, and building digital experiences that feel alive.
siteSettings.footerTagline: Building the future, one line of code at a time.

whyHireMeData.description: As an engineering student, I bring fresh perspectives combined with a disciplined approach to system design and software development.

siteSettings.aboutDescription:
I'm currently pursuing my Bachelor's Degree in Electronics & Communication Engineering. My journey began with a fascination for how hardware meets software, which inevitably led me down the rabbit hole of Full-Stack Development.

Today, I focus on building scalable web systems and analyzing complex algorithms. I don't just write code; I design systems that resolve real-world inefficiencies.

aboutTimeline.description: Deep diving into distributed systems, Docker, and Microservices architecture while building complex full-stack applications.

siteSettings.chatbotGreeting: Hi there! I'm Abdhesh's AI assistant. How can I help you today?

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Modern portfolio website built with React, TypeScript, and Express backend featuring a sci-fi themed UI with animated skill trees and glassmorphism effects.
projects.problemStatement: Needed a professional online presence to showcase projects and skills to potential employers and collaborators with a unique, memorable design.
projects.motivation: Create a modern, responsive portfolio that demonstrates full-stack development capabilities with cutting-edge UI/UX design principles.
projects.systemDesign: Full-stack application with React frontend using Framer Motion and Three.js for animations, Express REST API backend, PostgreSQL database with Drizzle ORM for type-safe queries, and custom sci-fi themed component library.
projects.challenges: Implementing complex animations like the 3D plexus and skill tree without performance issues, creating a cohesive sci-fi design language, and ensuring responsive design across all devices.
projects.learnings: Advanced animation techniques, full-stack development workflow, API design patterns, and the importance of consistent design systems.

projects.title: AI Study Buddy
projects.description: A Monolithic Flask application integrated with OpenRouter API (GPT-4o-mini) to provide AI-powered study assistance. Features a modern glassmorphic UI.
projects.problemStatement: Students often lack immediate access to tutoring or help when studying complex subjects, leading to frustration and slower learning.
projects.motivation: To leverage modern LLMs to provide a personal AI tutor that can answer questions and generate study materials in a visually appealing interface.
projects.systemDesign: Flask backend handling API requests to OpenRouter, using Jinja2 templates for dynamic content delivery. Frontend uses vanilla JavaScript for asynchronous communication and CSS for glassmorphism effects.
projects.challenges: Ensuring smooth API integration with error handling for rate limits or connectivity issues, and perfecting the glassmorphic UI without sacrificing readability.
projects.learnings: AI API integration, Flask web development, and advanced CSS styling techniques.

projects.title: Assistant (Edith)
projects.description: A modular Python-based desktop automation assistant with voice recognition and text-to-speech capabilities, designed to streamline daily tasks.
projects.problemStatement: Interacting with computer systems manually for repetitive tasks like opening apps, searching YouTube, or taking notes can be inefficient.
projects.motivation: Created to experiment with desktop automation and voice-UI (VUI) to build a hands-free interactive layer for Windows.
projects.systemDesign: Modular architecture with dedicated command mapping for dispatcher efficiency. Uses pyttsx3 for offline TTS and Google Speech Recognition for STT. pyautogui handles hardware control.
projects.challenges: Improving the robustness of voice command detection and ensuring file-path automation (like video playback) works across different system environments.
projects.learnings: Automation scripting, speech processing, and modular software design in Python.

mindsets.title: Occam's Razor
mindsets.description: The simplest explanation is usually the best. Applied to code: avoid over-engineering and keep solutions as simple as possible.

mindsets.title: The DRY Principle
mindsets.description: Don't Repeat Yourself. Every piece of knowledge must have a single, unambiguous, authoritative representation within a system.

mindsets.title: Growth Mindset
mindsets.description: Viewing challenges as opportunities to learn rather than obstacles. Documentation and failures are just data points for improvement.

mindsets.title: The KISS Principle
mindsets.description: Keep It Simple, Stupid. Complexity is a cost. I strive to write code that is easy to read, easy to test, and easy for the next developer to maintain.

experiences.description: Pursuing Bachelor's degree focusing on Embedded Systems, Signal Processing, and Software Engineering. Building strong foundation in hardware-software integration.
Building custom web solutions and automation scripts for various clients. Focused on React, Node.js, and Python ecosystems.
